nasb.text: So Ahaz slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city, in Jerusalem, for they did not bring him into the tombs of the kings of Israel; and Hezekiah his son reigned in his place.

esv.text: And Ahaz slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city, in Jerusalem, for they did not bring him into the tombs of the kings of Israel. And Hezekiah his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 亞哈斯和他的列祖同睡，埋葬在耶路撒冷城裡，但沒有葬在以色列諸王的陵墓裡。他的兒子希西家接續他作王。

ccb.text: 亚哈斯与祖先同眠后，葬在耶路撒冷城中，但没有葬在以色列的王陵。他儿子希西迦继位。
